theme_and_archetype.description: A cross between a high-end scientific journal and a minimalist beauty magazine. Extremely fluid, highly polished, zero glassmorphism, zero futurism. Strict bicolor palette.

colors.rule: Only opacity variations of the two base colors are allowed.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Let the typography and minimal lines breathe.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Flat panels. No rounded corners beyond very subtle 2px or 4px (or perfectly round 999px for pills/ovals). Zero drop shadows.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Fine 1px solid lines using rgba(232, 213, 192, 0.15). Used to separate sections asymmetrically or frame content.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Asymmetric grids for data representation (e.g., Report Screen).

motion_and_haptics.animations: Fluid, unhurried, graceful. Use react-native-reanimated for all transitions.
motion_and_haptics.haptics: expo-haptics is MANDATORY. Use 'impactLight' for swipes/minor actions, 'impactMedium' for button presses, and 'notificationSuccess' upon completing the 4-phase analysis.
motion_and_haptics.phases: Animations should feel clinical yet magical. E.g., a slow horizontal scanning line, fading SVG circles for micro-patterns.

AuthScreen.layout: Splash + Auth combined. Large Playfair typography for SKYN logo. Bottom sheet or simple buttons for Magic Link, Apple, Google.
AuthScreen.footer: GDPR warning in tiny uppercase DM Sans at the very bottom.

ProfileSetupScreen.interaction: Horizontal swipe-based pagination (1 question per screen).
ProfileSetupScreen.layout: Centered large typography for the question. Clean large input or list items.

DashboardScreen.layout: Hub screen. Top: Large typography greeting. Middle: SVG curve chart showing skin score evolution. Bottom: Minimalist history list.
DashboardScreen.cta: Central 'Nouveau Bilan' (New Scan) button, styled as a delicate pill or circle with a 1px border.

CameraScreen.layout: Fullscreen camera view. A delicate, fine oval overlay in the center to guide the face.
CameraScreen.ui: Pitch black #0D0D0D sections outside the oval (using a mask). Minimalist capture button (just a thin circle outline).

phases: 1. Surface scan: Fine sweeping line across the face image.
2. Thermal mapping: Abstract subtle fading opacities (using the bicolor palette).
3. Micro-patterns: Animated SVG circles appearing on targeted areas.
4. Report compilation: Typography shuffling and settling.
AnalysisScreen.vibe: Medical precision. No glowing neon. Use only #E8D5C0 with varying opacities.

ReportScreen.layout: Top: Global Score (0-100) inside a large, slow-animating SVG circle.
ReportScreen.grid: Asymmetric grid below for Texture, Radiance, and Imperfections.
ReportScreen.bottom_sheet: Recommendations panel sliding up from the bottom with elegant typography.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Thin stroke width (1px or 1.5px max). Color: #E8D5C0.

splash_background.description: Dark textured background for splash or auth, apply heavy opacity overlay of #0D0D0D.

camera_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the user's face during analysis screen if camera is not active.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native + Expo for mobile development.
Do NOT use web-only libraries like Tailwind (unless using NativeWind) or Shadcn-web; use proper React Native UI styling, typically StyleSheet or NativeWind if configured.
Use 'react-native-svg' for all charts, curves, and the circular score indicator.
Use 'react-native-reanimated' for high-performance fluid animations across screens.
Use 'expo-haptics' extensively to give the app a tactile, premium feel.
Strictly adhere to the #0D0D0D and #E8D5C0 color palette. NO GRADIENTS with other colors. NO SHADOWS.
Ensure the Playfair Display and DM Sans fonts are properly loaded via 'expo-font' before rendering the app.
Every touchable element must have a 'testID' attribute for testing. Do not use 'data-testid' as it is a web property, use 'testID' instead.
